user.title: Welcome
user.description: Give this heating control a unique name.

expert_hardware.title: 1/6 · Devices & Sensors
expert_hardware.description: Configure the physical hardware in this room: thermostats, temperature sensors, window contacts and outside temperature source.

data_description.trvs: At least one TRV is required.
data_description.temp_sensor: External sensor overrides the TRV's built‑in reading for better accuracy.

data_description.window_sensors: Heating pauses automatically when a sensor reports 'open'.
data_description.window_reaction_open: Wait this long before lowering the temperature.
data_description.window_reaction_close: Wait this long before restoring the temperature.
data_description.window_open_temp: Temperature used while a window or door is open (0.0 = OFF).
data_description.window_legacy_restore: If enabled, restore the target temperature that was active before the window was opened.

data_description.outside_temp_sensor: Temperature sensor used for the season mode threshold. Use a sensor entity for numeric readings.
data_description.outside_temp_threshold: Heating is disabled when outside temperature exceeds this value.
data_description.outside_temp_hysteresis: Prevents rapid switching near the threshold. Example: With a threshold of 17 °C and hysteresis of 1 °C, heating turns off at 18 °C and back on at 16 °C.
data_description.outside_temp_fallback: If the outside sensor fails, assume climate control is needed.
data_description.weather_entity: Optional weather entity for Weather Anticipation. When sunny or clear, the target temperature is reduced by the Weather Anticipation Offset. Allows using a separate temperature sensor for season mode and this entity for solar gain detection.

expert_climate.title: 2/6 · Climate & Schedule
expert_climate.description: Set target temperatures, choose your scheduling method, and configure thermostat calibration.

data_description.temp_comfort_static: Active temperature when someone is home.
data_description.hvac_mode_comfort: Which HVAC mode to set on the TRV during Comfort.
data_description.hvac_mode_eco: Which HVAC mode to set on the TRV during Eco.
data_description.hysteresis: Tolerance band used when 'Switch TRV off above room temperature' is enabled. The TRV switches off when room temperature exceeds target + hysteresis, and back on when it drops below target − hysteresis.

data_description.scheduling_mode: Choose 'Helper' for schedule entities or 'Calendar' for calendar‑based control.

data_description.calibration_mode: 'Native' adjusts the TRV's internal offset; 'Generic' adjusts the target temperature.
data_description.generic_calibration_limit: Maximum allowed offset for generic calibration to prevent overheating on sensor failure.
data_description.calibration_delta: Minimum temperature difference before a calibration update is sent.
data_description.calibration_keyword: Only calibrate entities whose name contains this keyword.
data_description.calibration_timeout: How often to recalculate the calibration offset.

expert_climate_calendar.title: 3/6 · Calendar Settings
expert_climate_calendar.description: Fine‑tune how calendar events control this room's heating.

data_description.calendar: Select one or more calendar entities to watch for events.
data_description.calendar_event: Comma‑separated keywords. Only events matching these will trigger heating.
data_description.calendar_room: Optional: only respond to events at this location.
data_description.calendar_scan_interval: How often to check the calendar for new events.
data_description.sync_calendar_with_entities: Write calendar temperatures into helper entities for dashboards.

expert_presence.title: 4/6 · Presence & People
expert_presence.description: Configure who lives here, how guests are handled, and how the system detects occupancy.

data_description.persons: Persons whose home/away status affects heating.
data_description.guest_mode: When any of these is ON, heating behaves as if someone is home.
data_description.people_entering_duration: Grace period before 'arriving home' triggers Comfort.
data_description.people_leaving_duration: Grace period before 'leaving home' triggers Eco.
data_description.persons_force_comfort: If ON, heating will stay on Comfort as long as someone is home, even if the schedule is in an Eco period.
data_description.persons_force_comfort_start: Start time for the presence override.
data_description.persons_force_comfort_end: End time for the presence override.

data_description.proximity_entity: HA Proximity integration entity for geo‑fencing.
data_description.proximity_distance: Start preheating when person is within this radius (meters).
data_description.proximity_duration: Person must be within radius for this long before triggering.

data_description.presence_sensor: A binary sensor for room‑level occupancy detection.
data_description.scheduler_presence: Schedule that defines when presence detection is active.
data_description.presence_reaction_on: Wait this long after detecting presence before switching to Comfort.
data_description.presence_reaction_off: Wait this long after losing presence before switching to Eco.

expert_automation.title: 5/6 · Behavior & Rules
expert_automation.description: Fine‑tune how the system reacts to various conditions: temperature limits, away mode, and manual overrides.

data.min_instead_of_off: Use minimum temp instead of OFF

data_description.min_instead_of_off: Never fully turn off the TRV; use its minimum setting instead.
data_description.reset_temperature: Revert manual overrides when the next schedule block begins.
data_description.off_if_above_room_temp: Turn off heating when the room is already warmer than the target.
data_description.off_if_nobody_home: Completely turn off heating when all persons are away.
data_description.ui_change: Detect and remember temperature changes made via the HA dashboard.
data_description.physical_change: Detect and remember temperature changes made on the TRV dial.

data_description.away_scheduler_mode: If enabled, the system continues following the schedule even when no one is home.
data_description.away_offset: Temperature reduction applied when the system is in away mode. Set to 0 to disable – away mode will then have no effect on temperature.
data_description.away_presence_mode: If enabled, local presence sensors still trigger comfort mode even during absence.
data_description.away_ignore_people: Do not use person tracking for away mode decisions.

data_description.aggressive_mode_selector: Boost heating when temperature is far from target.
data_description.aggressive_range: Temperature difference that activates aggressive heating.
data_description.aggressive_offset: Additional temperature offset during aggressive heating.

data_description.adjustments: JSON array of time‑based or entity‑based temperature adjustments.
data_description.sync_adjustments: Write computed adjustments back to helper entities.

expert_advanced.title: 6/6 · Advanced & Protection
expert_advanced.description: Season switch, valve positioning, frost & liming protection, and system timing.

data_description.season_mode_entity: Controls whether climate automation is active. ON = automation active, OFF = automation inactive.
data_description.idle_temperature: Fallback temperature when the automation is inactive.
data_description.room_temp_threshold_enabled: Enable an upper limit on room temperature.
data_description.room_temp_threshold: Stop the heating / AC when the room reaches this temperature.

data_description.valve_mode: Directly control TRV valve position instead of temperature.
data_description.valve_step: Percentage step size for each valve adjustment.
data_description.valve_timeout: Reset valve position after this timeout.
data_description.valve_keyword: Only control valves whose entity name contains this keyword.

data_description.frost_protection_enabled: Enable or disable automatic frost protection for this room.
data_description.frost_protection_temp: Minimum temperature to prevent pipes from freezing.
data_description.frost_protection_duration: Activate frost protection after everyone is away for this long.
data_description.liming_protection: Enable or disable automatic anti‑liming cycle (valve exercise).
data_description.liming_day: Day of the week for the anti‑liming cycle.
data_description.liming_time: Time of day for the anti‑liming cycle (HH:MM:SS).
data_description.liming_duration: Duration of the anti‑liming cycle in minutes.
data_description.liming_in_season: Also run the anti‑liming cycle during season mode.

data_description.action_delay: Minimum delay between consecutive TRV commands.
data_description.sensor_retention: Duration after HA boot where sensors (windows, persons) fall back to their last known state to prevent false triggers.

data_description.schedulers: Select schedule helper entities for Comfort/Eco switching.
data_description.scheduler_selector: Optional entity that selects which schedule is active.

error.no_trvs: Please select at least one thermostat (TRV).
